advancements.minecolonytax.codex.claim_t: Claim tax revenue from your colony for the first time.
advancements.minecolonytax.codex.declare: Declare war on an enemy colony.
advancements.minecolonytax.codex.root.de: Begin your journey into economic warfare!
advancements.minecolonytax.codex.start_r: Start your first raid on an enemy colony.
command.checktax.no_colonies: You are not an owner or officer of any colonies.
command.claimtax.invalid_amount: Invalid amount. Please specify a positive number.
command.claimtax.no_colonies: You are not an owner or officer of any colonies.
command.claimtax.no_tax: No taxes available to claim for colony %s.
command.claimtax.success: You have claimed %d in tax revenue from colony %s.
command.joinwar.attacking: ⚔️ You have joined the attacking side!
command.joinwar.defending: 🛡️ You have joined the defending side!
command.leavewar.error.owner: ❌ Colony owners cannot leave an active war.
command.minecolonytax.inactivity_status: Colony %s: Last contact %d hours ago. Inactivity threshold: %d hours. Status: %s
command.minecolonytax.taxgui.server_mess: Use the Tax Management GUI by pressing 'T' key or typing /taxgui in your client.
command.suepeace.accept: ✅ Peace proposal accepted. The war will now end.
command.suepeace.declined.team: ❌🕊️ The peace proposal has been declined by the colony owner.
command.suepeace.sent: 🕊️ Peace proposal sent to the opposing side.
gui.minecolonytax.no_colonies: No colonies found. You must be an owner or officer of at least one colony.
gui.minecolonytax.tax_management.title: Colony Tax Management
message.minecolonytax.colony_inactive: Colony %s is inactive (last contact: %d hours ago). Tax generation paused until owner/officer returns.
message.minecolonytax.colony_reactivated: Colony %s has been reactivated! Tax generation resumed.
message.minecolonytax.debt_warning: Colony: %s - Warning: Maintenance (%d coins) exceeded generated tax (%d coins).
message.minecolonytax.tax_report: Colony: %s - Generated Tax: %d coins added; Maintenance Deducted: %d coins.
message.minecolonytax.tax_report_guard_b: Guard Tower Boost: %d towers provide +%d%% tax boost (+%d coins)
message.minecolonytax.tax_report_status_: WARNING: Colony is %d coins in debt! Consider reducing expenses.
STATUS: Colony finances are stable and healthy.
NOTICE: Approaching maximum tax storage (%d coins). Consider claiming taxes!
message.minecolonytax.tax_report_tribute: Vassal Tribute: -%d coins sent to overlord
minecolonytax.book.landing: Welcome to the $(war)War 'N Taxes$() Codex! This guide will teach you everything about the tax system, raids, wars, and more. $(br2)$(tip)Tip: Click on commands to execute them!$(/tip)
minecolonytax.book.name: War 'N Taxes Codex
minecolonytax.category.commands.name: Commands
minecolonytax.category.configuration.des: Server admin settings and advanced options.
minecolonytax.category.diplomacy.name: Diplomacy
minecolonytax.category.getting_started.d: New to War & Taxes? Start here to learn the basics.
minecolonytax.category.pvp_arena.desc: Duels and team battles outside the colony system.
minecolonytax.category.pvp_arena.name: PvP Arena
minecolonytax.category.raid_system.desc: Quick strikes to steal tax from enemy colonies.
minecolonytax.category.raid_system.name: Raids
minecolonytax.category.tax_system.desc: Learn how tax generation, modifiers, and claiming work.
minecolonytax.category.tax_system.name: Tax System
minecolonytax.category.war_system.desc: Full-scale conflicts for dominance and rewards.
minecolonytax.category.war_system.name: Wars
minecolonytax.entry.abandonment.auto: If owners/officers don't visit for $(thing)14 days$() (default), the colony becomes Abandoned.$(br2)You will receive warnings in chat before this happens.$(br2)$(tip)Login to refresh your activity!$(/tip)
minecolonytax.entry.abandonment.name: Abandonment
minecolonytax.entry.abandonment.page0: Colonies can be abandoned manually or automatically.$(br2)Abandoned colonies stop functioning and can be claimed by others.$(br2)$(warning)Abandoned colonies lose all protection!$(/warning)
minecolonytax.entry.admin_commands.contr: $(c:/wnt warstop)$(/c) - Stop current war$(br)$(c:/wnt stopallwars)$(/c) - Stop all wars$(br)$(c:/wnt raidstop)$(/c) - Stop active raid$(br)$(c:/wnt taxgen)$(/c) - Force tax generation$(br)$(c:/wnt forceabandon <colony>)$(/c) - Abandon colony
minecolonytax.entry.admin_commands.debug: $(c:/wnt debugtax <colony>)$(/c) - Tax breakdown$(br)$(c:/wnt debugguards <colony>)$(/c) - Guard info$(br)$(c:/wnt wardebug)$(/c) - War state$(br)$(c:/wnt raidhistory <colony>)$(/c) - Raid log
minecolonytax.entry.admin_commands.name: Admin Commands
minecolonytax.entry.admin_commands.page0: These commands require $(warning)operator permissions$(/warning) and are for server administrators only.
minecolonytax.entry.claiming_colonies.pa: You can take over abandoned colonies!$(br2)$(cmd)/wnt claimcolony <colony>$(/cmd)$(br2)This starts a special $(raid)Claiming Raid$().
minecolonytax.entry.claiming_colonies.ra: To prove you are worthy:$(li)Survive a 5-minute raid$(li)Citizens become hostile militia$(li)If you survive, you become the new Owner!$(br2)$(success)Instant expansion for your empire.$(/success)
minecolonytax.entry.claiming_tax.name: Claiming Tax
minecolonytax.entry.claiming_tax.page0: Accumulated tax must be claimed manually:$(br2)$(c:/wnt claimtax)[Claim All Tax]$(/c)$(br2)$(c:/wnt claimtax 100)[Claim 100]$(/c)$(br2)Use /wnt claimtax <colony> <amount> for specific colony.
minecolonytax.entry.claiming_tax.restric: $(warning)You cannot claim tax during:$(/warning)$(br2)$(li)Active wars (join phase or combat)$(li)While being raided$(br2)This prevents players from quickly withdrawing funds when under attack.
minecolonytax.entry.declaring_war.extort: You can demand payment to avoid war:$(br2)$(cmd)/wnt wagewar <colony> <percent>$(/cmd)$(br2)Example: $(cmd)/wnt wagewar EnemyColony 15$(/cmd) demands 15% of their wealth.$(br2)If they pay, you get money without fighting!
minecolonytax.entry.declaring_war.name: Declaring War
minecolonytax.entry.declaring_war.page0: To declare war:$(br2)$(cmd)/wnt wagewar <colony>$(/cmd)$(br2)The target must respond: accept, decline, or pay extortion.
minecolonytax.entry.declaring_war.requir: War requires more buildings than raids:$(br2)$(li)Town Hall (level 2+)$(li)3+ Guard Towers (level 1+)$(li)Builder's Hut (level 1+)$(li)Residential building (level 1+)$(br2)$(c:/wnt help wagewar)[View War Requirements]$(/c)
minecolonytax.entry.duels.challenging: To challenge someone:$(li)Both must be online$(li)Use command or click here$(li)Opponent accepts with $(cmd)/wnt duel accept$(/cmd)$(br2)Winner gets bragging rights (and maybe a bet)!
minecolonytax.entry.duels.name: Duels
minecolonytax.entry.duels.page0: $(diamond)PvP Arena$() allows friendly combat without war consequences.$(br2)Duels are 1v1 battles.$(br2)$(cmd)/wnt duel <player>$(/cmd)$(br2)Inventory is saved and restored after the duel.
minecolonytax.entry.extortion.immunity: Paying extortion grants you $(success)Immunity$() for a configurable time (default: 24h).$(br2)During this time, no one can declare war on you.$(br2)Use this time to rebuild your defenses!
minecolonytax.entry.extortion.name: Extortion
minecolonytax.entry.extortion.page0: Aggressors can demand $(warning)Extortion$() when declaring war.$(br2)If the defender pays, the war is cancelled.$(br2)This is a way to get rich without fighting, or for weak colonies to buy safety.
minecolonytax.entry.extortion.paying: When war is declared with extortion, you have a limited time to pay.$(br2)$(li)Check amount: $(cmd)/wnt warinfo$(/cmd)$(li)Pay: $(cmd)/wnt payextortion$(/cmd)$(br2)If you don't pay, the war starts automatically!
minecolonytax.entry.first_steps.name: First Steps
minecolonytax.entry.first_steps.page0: $(important)Prerequisite:$(/important) You must first establish a colony using $(thing)MineColonies$(). Build a Town Hall and start your colony before using War 'N Taxes features.$(br2)This guide will walk you through your first actions. Follow these steps to get started!
minecolonytax.entry.first_steps.step1: First, see how much tax your colony has accumulated:$(br2)$(c:/wnt checktax)[Click to Check Tax]$(/c)$(br2)This shows your current balance and any debt.
minecolonytax.entry.first_steps.step2: When you have tax available, claim it:$(br2)$(c:/wnt claimtax)[Click to Claim Tax]$(/c)$(br2)The tax will be added to your inventory or economy balance.
minecolonytax.entry.first_steps.step3: View all available commands:$(br2)$(c:/wnt help)[Click for Help]$(/c)$(br2)For specific topics: $(c:/wnt help raid)[Raid Help]$(/c), $(c:/wnt help war)[War Help]$(/c)
minecolonytax.entry.guard_tower_boost.pa: Building $(guard)Guard Towers$() provides a tax bonus!$(br2)When you have enough guard towers, you receive a percentage boost to all tax generation. This rewards players who invest in colony defense.
minecolonytax.entry.guard_tower_boost.re: $(li)Default: $(guard)5 Guard Towers$() for $(success)+25% boost$()$(li)Towers must be level 1 or higher$(li)Boost is calculated after happiness$(br2)$(tip)Tip: Guard towers also protect you from raids!$(/tip)
minecolonytax.entry.happiness_modifier.e: $(li)$(success)7.0-10.0$(): Bonus up to +50%$(li)$(thing)5.0-7.0$(): Neutral/slight bonus$(li)$(warning)4.0-5.0$(): Slight penalty$(li)$(warning)0.0-4.0$(): Penalty up to -50%$(br2)Keep your citizens happy with food variety, housing, and low danger!
minecolonytax.entry.happiness_modifier.p: Your citizens' $(success)happiness$() directly affects tax income!$(br2)Happiness ranges from 0 to 10. Happy citizens (7-10) can boost income by up to $(success)+50%$(), while unhappy citizens (0-4) reduce income by up to $(warning)-50%$().
minecolonytax.entry.how_taxes_work.build: Each building contributes differently:$(br2)$(li)$(thing)Town Hall$(): Base income$(li)$(thing)Houses$(): Citizen productivity$(li)$(thing)Workshops$(): Production output$(li)$(thing)Guard Towers$(): Security bonus$(br2)Higher levels = more income and sometimes special bonuses.
minecolonytax.entry.how_taxes_work.gener: Tax is generated in cycles:$(br2)$(li)Buildings add revenue based on level$(li)Maintenance costs are subtracted$(li)Modifiers (happiness, guards) are applied$(li)Net income is added to your balance$(br2)Use $(cmd)/wnt debugtax <colony>$(/cmd) to see a detailed breakdown.
minecolonytax.entry.how_taxes_work.modif: Several factors can increase or decrease your income. Click to learn more about each.
minecolonytax.entry.how_taxes_work.name: How Taxes Work
minecolonytax.entry.how_taxes_work.page0: Colonies generate $(tax)tax revenue$() automatically at regular intervals (default: every 6 hours).$(br2)Each building contributes to your income based on its type and level. Higher-level buildings generate more tax!
minecolonytax.entry.militia.entity: Militia are equipped with $(thing)Wooden Swords$() and behave like guards but with lower stats. They will return to normal work after the raid ends.
minecolonytax.entry.militia.name: Citizen Militia
minecolonytax.entry.militia.page0: When a raid starts, your $(l)Citizens$() can take up arms!$(br2)If enabled in config, citizens will automatically equip a $(thing)Wooden Sword$() and fight the raiders.$(br2)They count towards your total defenders.
minecolonytax.entry.peace_proposals.name: Peace Proposals
minecolonytax.entry.peace_proposals.page: Wars don't have to be eternal.$(br2)At any time, either side can propose peace using commands.$(br2)$(cmd)/wnt peace white$(/cmd) - End war with no exchange.$(br2)$(cmd)/wnt peace reparations <amount>$(/cmd) - Offer money to end war.
minecolonytax.entry.peace_proposals.repa: If you are losing, you can offer $(coins)reparations$() to end the war.$(br2)$(cmd)/wnt peace reparations 1000$(/cmd)$(br2)If accepted, you pay the amount and the war ends.$(br2)$(tip)Better to pay a little than lose everything!$(/tip)
minecolonytax.entry.peace_proposals.whit: A $(l)White Peace$() returns everything to the way it was before the war.$(br2)$(li)No territory change$(li)No money paid$(li)War ends immediately$(br2)Useful when both sides realize the war is a stalemate.
minecolonytax.entry.player_commands.comb: $(c:/wnt raid <colony>)$(/c) - Start raid$(br)$(c:/wnt wagewar <colony>)$(/c) - Declare war$(br)$(c:/wnt joinwar)$(/c) - Join active war$(br)$(c:/wnt leavewar)$(/c) - Leave before combat$(br)$(c:/wnt warinfo)$(/c) - War status
minecolonytax.entry.player_commands.dipl: $(c:/wnt peace white)$(/c) - Propose white peace$(br)$(c:/wnt peace reparations <amount>)$(/c) - Propose with payment$(br)$(c:/wnt acceptpeace)$(/c) - Accept proposal$(br)$(c:/wnt declinepeace)$(/c) - Decline proposal$(br)$(c:/wnt vassals)$(/c) - View vassalizations
minecolonytax.entry.player_commands.name: Player Commands
minecolonytax.entry.player_commands.page: Complete reference for all $(cmd)/wnt$(/cmd) commands available to players.$(br2)$(c:/wnt help)[Show All Commands]$(/c)
minecolonytax.entry.player_commands.tax: $(c:/wnt checktax)$(cmd)[Check Balance]$(/cmd)$(/c)$(br)$(c:/wnt claimtax)$(cmd)[Claim Tax]$(/cmd)$(/c)$(br)$(c:/wnt claimtax <amount>)$(/c) - Partial claim$(br)$(c:/wnt taxgui)$(cmd)[Open Tax GUI]$(/cmd)$(/c)
minecolonytax.entry.raid_mechanics.bossb: The raid boss bar shows:$(br2)$(li)Time remaining$(li)Guards killed / Total guards$(li)Current status$(br2)Watch it to track your progress!
minecolonytax.entry.raid_mechanics.bound: $(warning)If you leave the colony during a raid, you are instantly disqualified!$(/warning)$(br2)$(li)No rewards$(li)Raid ends immediately$(li)No grace period$(br2)Stay focused and fight within the colony!
minecolonytax.entry.raid_mechanics.name: Raid Mechanics
minecolonytax.entry.raid_mechanics.page0: Once a raid starts, you have a limited time (default: 5 minutes) to kill as many guards and militia as possible.$(br2)$(important)Stay inside the colony boundaries!$(/important)
minecolonytax.entry.raid_overview.learn_: Click these entries to learn about starting raids, mechanics, and rewards.
minecolonytax.entry.raid_overview.name: Raid Overview
minecolonytax.entry.raid_overview.page0: $(raid)Raids$() are quick attacks on enemy colonies to $(coins)steal tax revenue$().$(br2)During a raid, you enter the target colony and fight their guards and militia. Each kill earns you a percentage of their stored taxes!
minecolonytax.entry.raid_overview.vswar: $(l)Raids$():$(li)Single player$(li)5 minutes (default)$(li)Steal percentage of taxes$(li)Leave = disqualification$(br2)$(l)Wars$():$(li)Multiple players (teams)$(li)Longer duration$(li)Higher stakes$(li)Can transfer colony ownership
minecolonytax.entry.raid_rewards.defense: $(success)Defenders$() also earn rewards:$(br2)$(li)If the raider dies, defenders earn a percentage$(li)Rewards go to the colony tax pool$(li)Check your balance after surviving a raid!
minecolonytax.entry.raid_rewards.name: Raid Rewards
minecolonytax.entry.raid_rewards.page0: Rewards are based on how many guards and militia you kill during the raid.$(br2)Each kill earns you a percentage of the target colony's stored tax revenue.
minecolonytax.entry.raid_rewards.stealin: $(li)Each guard kill = % of taxes stolen$(li)Maximum steal amount is capped$(li)Must kill at least 1 guard for rewards$(li)Killing all guards = maximum reward$(br2)$(warning)If you die, the defender gets a bonus!$(/warning)
minecolonytax.entry.starting_raids.comma: $(c:/wnt help raid)[View Raid Help]$(/c)$(br2)This shows current server requirements for raids.
minecolonytax.entry.starting_raids.name: Starting a Raid
minecolonytax.entry.starting_raids.page0: To start a raid, use:$(br2)$(cmd)/wnt raid <colony>$(/cmd)$(br2)Replace <colony> with the target colony name or ID.
minecolonytax.entry.starting_raids.requi: To raid another colony, $(l)you$() need:$(li)Town Hall (level 1+)$(li)3+ Guard Towers (level 1+)$(br2)The $(l)target$() colony needs:$(li)Minimum guards (configurable)$(li)Minimum guard towers (configurable)$(li)Not currently in a war/raid
minecolonytax.entry.tax_rates.command: Use /wnt checktax to see your balance.$(br2)Use /wnt debugtax to see detailed breakdown per building.
minecolonytax.entry.tax_rates.name: Tax Rates
minecolonytax.entry.tax_rates.page0: Each building type generates tax based on its level. $(config)Default values - server may differ.$(/config)$(br2)$(li)$(thing)Town Hall$(): 2.0 per level$(li)$(thing)Houses$(): 0.5 per level$(li)$(thing)Guard Tower$(): 1.0 per level$(li)$(thing)Workshops$(): 1.5 per level$(li)$(thing)Farms$(): 0.8 per level
minecolonytax.entry.tax_rates.title: Building Taxes
minecolonytax.entry.team_battles.name: Team Battles
minecolonytax.entry.team_battles.page0: Team Battles allow groups to fight!$(br2)$(cmd)/wnt teambattle create$(/cmd) - Start lobby$(br2)$(cmd)/wnt teambattle join Red/Blue$(/cmd) - Join team$(br2)Great for training your officers!
minecolonytax.entry.team_battles.setup: $(li)Host creates battle$(li)Players join Red or Blue team$(li)Host starts game$(li)Fight until one team is eliminated$(br2)$(warning)Friendly fire is disabled by default.$(/warning)
minecolonytax.entry.war_overview.learn_m: Explore the war system in detail.
minecolonytax.entry.war_overview.name: War Overview
minecolonytax.entry.war_overview.page0: $(war)Wars$() are large-scale conflicts between colonies with higher stakes than raids.$(br2)Wars involve multiple players, have phases, and can result in $(important)colony ownership transfer$(/important) or $(important)vassalization$(/important)!
minecolonytax.entry.war_overview.stakes: $(li)$(coins)Currency rewards$() from losing side$(li)$(thing)Colony ownership$() transfer (if enabled)$(li)$(thing)Vassalization$() - losers pay tribute$(li)$(warning)Reputation and dominance$()$(br2)Wars are serious business!
minecolonytax.entry.war_phases.combat: $(li)PvP combat between teams$(li)Guard/Player kills are tracked$(li)Boss bar shows progress$(li)Victory conditions vary by config
minecolonytax.entry.war_phases.declarati: $(li)Attacker declares war$(li)Defender can: Accept, Decline, or Pay Extortion$(li)If no response, war auto-starts$(li)Both colony owners are locked in
minecolonytax.entry.war_phases.join: $(li)Officers and allies can join either side$(li)Teams must be roughly balanced$(li)Use $(cmd)/wnt joinwar$(/cmd) to participate$(li)Duration is configurable
minecolonytax.entry.war_phases.name: War Phases
minecolonytax.entry.war_phases.page0: Wars progress through several phases, each with different rules and opportunities.
minecolonytax.entry.war_vassalization.du: $(li)Default: $(thing)168 hours$() (1 week)$(li)Automatically expires$(li)Both parties notified$(li)Colony returns to independence$(br2)$(c:/wnt vassals)[View Vassal Status]$(/c)
minecolonytax.entry.war_vassalization.pa: When colony transfer is disabled, war winners can $(thing)vassalize$() the losers instead of taking ownership.$(br2)Vassals pay a percentage of their tax income as tribute to their overlord!
minecolonytax.entry.war_vassalization.tr: $(li)Default: $(warning)25%$() of tax income$(li)Automatically deducted each cycle$(li)Sent directly to overlord colony$(li)Cannot be avoided while vassalized
minecolonytax.entry.welcome.explore.desc: Click any of these to learn more about that system.
minecolonytax.entry.welcome.name: Welcome
minecolonytax.entry.welcome.page0: $(l)War 'N Taxes$() is a $(thing)MineColonies addon$() that adds economic warfare to your colonies!$(br2)Your colony generates $(tax)tax revenue$() based on its buildings. Other players can $(raid)raid$() you to steal taxes, or declare full-scale $(war)wars$() for even greater stakes.$(br2)This codex will teach you everything you need to know.
minecolonytax.entry.welcome.page1: $(li)$(tax)Tax System$(): Colonies generate passive income$(li)$(raid)Raids$(): Quick attacks to steal a percentage of taxes$(li)$(war)Wars$(): Full conflicts with join phases and rewards$(li)$(thing)Diplomacy$(): Peace proposals, extortion, vassalization$(li)$(guard)Defense$(): Guards and militia protect your colony
minecolonytax.entry.welcome.page1.title: Key Systems
peace.accept.message: ✅ You have accepted the peace proposal.
peace.decline.message: ❌ You have declined the peace proposal.
peace.proposal.title: 🕊️ PEACE OFFERED! 🕊️
peace.timeout.body: The peace proposal concerning %s and %s has expired due to no response.
peace.timeout.title: ⏳🕊️ Peace Proposal Expired 🕊️⏳

raid.alert.colony: 🚨 RAID ALERT! 🚨 Colony %s is being raided by %s!
raid.already.active.error: ❗ A raid is already active! Only one raid can run at a time.
raid.defender.victory.title: ⚔ RAID DEFENDER VICTORY! ⚔
raid.end.colony.body:

Reason: %s
raid.end.raider.body:

raid.initiate.message: ⚔️ Raid initiated on %s! ⚔️ Stay in the colony!
raid.protection.guard_towers: Target colony is protected from raids! They must have at least %d guard towers to be raided. (Found: %d guard towers)
raid.protection.guards: Target colony is protected from raids! They must have at least %d guards to be raided. (Found: %d guards)
raid.warning.title: 🚨 RAID WARNING 🚨
taxmanager.error: An error occurred while claiming your reward.
taxmanager.inventory_full: Your inventory is full! Dropped %d %s near you.
war.accept.body: %s (led by %s) has accepted the challenge! War against %s will now proceed to the join phase!
war.accept.title: ✅ WAR ACCEPTED! ✅
war.attacker.victory.strategic: The attackers from %s have achieved a STRATEGIC VICTORY over %s with superior performance!
war.attacker.victory.total: The attackers from %s have achieved TOTAL VICTORY over the defenders of %s!
war.attackers.win.body: The relentless forces of %s have conquered %s! A new era begins under their banner!
war.attackers.win.title: ⚔️ ATTACKERS TRIUMPHANT! ⚔️
war.balance.condition: Join phase balance condition not met! Teams must be balanced (diff <= 1). Current: Attackers=
war.begin.body: Forces of %s and %s are now locked in combat! May the most cunning prevail!
war.begin.title: 🔥 THE WAR BEGINS! 🔥
war.declare.title: 📜 WAR DECLARED! 📜
war.decline.body: %s (led by %s) has declined the war declaration.
war.decline.title: ❌ WAR DECLINED ❌
war.defender.victory.strategic: The defenders of %s have achieved a STRATEGIC VICTORY. They lost fewer forces than the invaders!
war.defender.victory.total: The defenders of %s have achieved TOTAL VICTORY as the attackers faltered!
war.defenders.win.body: The valiant defenders of %s have repelled the assault from %s! Their lands remain secure!
war.defenders.win.title: 🏆 DEFENDERS VICTORIOUS! 🏆
war.drums.sound: The drums of war sound! Join phase starting immediately!
war.end.inventory.restored: The war has ended. Your inventory has been restored, and you are now in Survival!
war.forces.label: Forces of
war.guard.death.attacker.title: 🛡️ Enemy Guard Down! 🛡️
war.guard.death.defender.title: ❗ Your Guard Has Fallen! ❗
war.initiate.drums: The drums of war sound! Join phase starting immediately!
war.initiate.title: ⚔️ WAR INITIATED! ⚔️
war.join.phase.cannot.leave: Join phase is over; you cannot leave now.
war.join.phase.declared: War declared for colony %s! Join phase has begun. Time left: %s
war.join.phase.now.active: will now proceed to the join phase!
war.join.phase.started: Join phase started for colony %s. Waiting for participants for %d seconds.
war.player.killed.remaining: %s has %d lives remaining for this combatant.
war.player.killed.title: 💀 CASUALTY OF WAR! 💀
war.request.expired.attacker: Your war request to %s has expired.
war.request.expired.defender: War request for your colony has expired.
war.siege.status: %s is Under Siege! Joining Phase initiated. Time left: %s
war.stalemate.body: The war between %s and %s has ended in a stalemate due to inactivity. No victor emerges from the fog of war... this time.
war.stalemate.no.losses: Neither side gained an advantage. The war ends with no territorial changes.
war.stalemate.proportional: Both sides sustained proportional losses. The war ends in a STALEMATE.
war.stalemate.proportional.penalties: Both sides sustained comparable losses. Penalties apply.
war.stalemate.timeout.part3: ends. With no decisive action, it's a STALEMATE!
war.stalemate.title: ⚖️ WAR STALEMATE ⚖️
war.time.expired.attackers.part2: have achieved TOTAL VICTORY as the defenders crumbled!
war.time.expired.defenders.part2: have achieved TOTAL VICTORY as the attackers faltered!
war.time.expired.title: ⏳ TIME EXPIRED! ⏳
war.vassalization.defeat: Your colony has been vassalized by %s for %s!
war.vassalization.expired.body: The vassalization of colony '%s' has expired.
war.vassalization.expired.title: ⚔ WAR VASSALIZATION ENDED ⚔
war.vassalization.info: Your colony is a war vassal to %s. Remaining: %s
war.vassalization.title: ⚔ WAR VASSALIZATION ⚔
war.vassalization.victory: Colony '%s' is now your vassal for %s!
